# X Travel (xturizm.com)

> X Travel is a TURSAB-certified Turkish online travel agency offering flight tickets, hotel reservations, airport transfers, bus tickets, car rentals, and tour packages across 50+ countries.

## Services
- [Flights](https://xturizm.com/ucus): Domestic and international flight booking with 500+ airlines
- [Hotels](https://xturizm.com/otel): 10,000+ hotel options worldwide
- [Transfers](https://xturizm.com/transfer): Airport and city transfers
- [Tours](https://xturizm.com/tur): Domestic and international tour packages
- [Bus Tickets](https://xturizm.com/otobus): Intercity bus tickets across Turkey
- [Car Rental](https://xturizm.com/arac-kiralama): Vehicle rental services
- [Campaigns](https://xturizm.com/kampanyalar): Current deals and promotions

## Content
- [Blog](https://xturizm.com/blog): Travel tips, destination guides, and industry news in Turkish

## Company
- [About](https://xturizm.com/hakkimizda): Company information
- [Contact](https://xturizm.com/iletisim): Contact details
- [Careers](https://xturizm.com/kariyer): Job opportunities

## Key Facts
- Website: https://xturizm.com
- Language: Turkish
- Market: Turkey
- Certification: TURSAB (Association of Turkish Travel Agencies)
- Airline partners: 500+
- Hotel options: 10,000+
- Countries served: 50+

## Optional
- [Sitemap](https://xturizm.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://xturizm.com/robots.txt)
